原文: Everyone knows that fish is good for health. G. The fats① in fish are thought to help prevent② heart disease③. But it seems that many people don't cook fish at home. Americans eat only about fifteen pounds of fish per person per year, but we eat twice as much fish in restaurants as at home. Buying, storing④, and cooking fish isn't difficult. D. It just requires⑤ a little knowledge⑥. This text is about how to buy and cook fish in an easy way.
翻译: 众所周知，鱼肉对健康有益。G. 鱼肉中的脂肪被认为有助于预防心脏病。但似乎许多人在家不做鱼。美国人每年人均只吃大约十五磅鱼，但我们在餐馆吃的鱼是在家吃的两倍。购买、储存和烹饪鱼并不难。D. 它只需要一点知识。本文是关于如何以简单的方式购买和烹饪鱼。
必背词汇:
① fat /fæt/ n. 脂肪 adj. 肥胖的
Ⓡ fatty /ˈfæti/ adj. 含脂肪的
Ⓡ fatten /ˈfætn/ v. 使变胖
② prevent /prɪˈvent/ v. 预防，阻止
Ⓡ prevention /prɪˈvenʃn/ n. 预防
Ⓡ prevent...from... 阻止...做...
③ disease /dɪˈziːz/ n. 疾病
Ⓡ ease /iːz/ n. 轻松 v. 减轻
Ⓡ ill /ɪl/ adj. 生病的
④ store /stɔː(r)/ v. 储存 n. 商店
Ⓡ storage /ˈstɔːrɪdʒ/ n. 储存
Ⓡ restore /rɪˈstɔː(r)/ v. 恢复
⑤ require /rɪˈkwaɪə(r)/ v. 需要；要求
Ⓡ requirement /rɪˈkwaɪəmənt/ n. 要求；必需品
Ⓡ acquire /əˈkwaɪə(r)/ v. 获得
⑥ knowledge /ˈnɒlɪdʒ/ n. 知识
Ⓡ know /nəʊ/ v. 知道
Ⓡ acknowledge /əkˈnɒlɪdʒ/ v. 承认

原文: F. When buying fish, you should first smell it. Fresh fish should smell sweet: you should feel that you're standing at the ocean's edge. Any fishy⑦ or strong smell means the fish isn't fresh. A. Do not buy it. When you have bought a fish and arrive home, you'd better store the fish in the refrigerator⑧ if you don't cook it immediately, but fresh fish should be stored in your fridge for only a day or two. Frozen fish isn't as tasty⑨ as the fresh one.
翻译: F. 购买鱼时，你应该先闻一闻。新鲜的鱼应该闻起来有甜味：你应该感觉像站在海边。任何鱼腥味或强烈的气味都意味着鱼不新鲜。A. 不要购买它。当你买了一条鱼回到家，如果不立即烹饪，最好将鱼储存在冰箱里，但新鲜鱼在冰箱里只能储存一两天。冷冻鱼不如新鲜鱼美味。
必背词汇:
⑦ fishy /ˈfɪʃi/ adj. 鱼腥味的；可疑的
Ⓡ fish /fɪʃ/ n. 鱼 v. 钓鱼
Ⓡ fisherman /ˈfɪʃəmən/ n. 渔夫
⑧ refrigerator /rɪˈfrɪdʒəreɪtə(r)/ n. 冰箱
Ⓡ fridge /frɪdʒ/ n. 冰箱（口语）
Ⓡ refrigerate /rɪˈfrɪdʒəreɪt/ v. 冷藏
⑨ tasty /ˈteɪsti/ adj. 美味的
Ⓡ taste /teɪst/ n. 味道 v. 品尝
Ⓡ tasteless /ˈteɪstləs/ adj. 无味的

原文: There are many common methods⑩ used to cook fish. B. The easiest is to steam⑪ it. First, clean it and season⑫ it with your choice of spices(调料). Put the whole fish on a plate and steam it in a steam pot for 8 to 10 minutes if it weighs⑬ about one pound. (A larger one will take more time.)Then, it's ready to serve⑭.
翻译: 有许多常用的方法来烹饪鱼。B. 最简单的方法是蒸它。首先，清洗它并用你选择的调料调味。将整条鱼放在盘子上，如果它重约一磅，在蒸锅中蒸8到10分钟。（更大的鱼需要更多时间。）然后，就可以上菜了。
必背词汇:
⑩ method /ˈmeθəd/ n. 方法
Ⓡ methodology /ˌmeθəˈdɒlədʒi/ n. 方法论
Ⓡ systematic /ˌsɪstəˈmætɪk/ adj. 系统的
⑪ steam /stiːm/ v. 蒸 n. 蒸汽
Ⓡ steamer /ˈstiːmə(r)/ n. 蒸锅；蒸汽船
Ⓡ steamy /ˈstiːmi/ adj. 蒸汽的
⑫ season /ˈsiːzn/ v. 调味 n. 季节
Ⓡ seasoning /ˈsiːznɪŋ/ n. 调味品
Ⓡ seasonal /ˈsiːzənl/ adj. 季节性的
⑬ weigh /weɪ/ v. 称重；重达
Ⓡ weight /weɪt/ n. 重量
Ⓡ weighty /ˈweɪti/ adj. 沉重的
⑭ serve /sɜːv/ v. 上菜；服务
Ⓡ service /ˈsɜːvɪs/ n. 服务
Ⓡ servant /ˈsɜːvənt/ n. 仆人
